{{Quote|Kill humans? Haven't killed any humans yet.|Hovrak|<ref name="Young Jedi Knights: Jedi Bounty">''[[Young Jedi Knights: Jedi Bounty]]''</ref>}}
'''Hovrak''' was the [[Adjutant Advisor]] of [[Nolaa Tarkona]], head of the fanatical [[Diversity Alliance]]. He was a [[Shistavanen/Legends|Shistavanen]] and a cannibal as well. On one occasion, he ate a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Unidentified Human prisoner|convict]] from [[Concord Dawn/Legends|Concord Dawn]].

==Biography==
Like many of his colleagues, Hovrak hated Humans. When the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Lowbacca]] joined the Diversity Alliance in [[24 ABY/Legends|24 ABY]], his four Human Jedi friends [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]], [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]], [[Tenel Ka Djo|Tenel Ka]] and [[Raynar Thul]] traveled to the Alliance headquarters of [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]]—where he had been touring—to persuade him that he had been misguided.

Unfortunately for them, they were captured. However, thanks to the treachery of Lowbacca, they managed to escaped into the harsh terrain of Ryloth. Hovrak and several of his men gave chase though they donned bulky, heat reflective suits to protect themselves from Ryloth's harsh sun. Hovrak eventually caught up with them though he was kicked off the escaping transport ''[[Lightning Rod]]''{{'s}} ramp by former-Alliance member [[Lusa]] and fell to his death in a molten lake.
